scripts.build:android:apk: expo prebuild --platform android --clean && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios:simulator: expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && cd ios && pod install --repo-update && cd .. && xcodebuild -workspace ios/WHOVA2022Demo.xcworkspace -scheme WHOVA2022Demo -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath ios/build/DerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -jobs 2 build
